description: Complete React frontend with Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Router v6, role-based routing, and full UI for all four roles (Admin, Trainer, Counsellor, Student). Includes login page, dashboards, CRUD interfaces, attendance system UI (QR display/scan), and all module pages.
steps: Create frontend/package.json with dependencies: react, react-dom, react-router-dom, axios, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, @headlessui/react, @heroicons/react, chart.js, react-chartjs-2, qrcode.react, html5-qrcode, date-fns, react-hot-toast, @tanstack/react-query. Dev deps: vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, typescript, @types/react, @types/react-dom, vitest, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom, jsdom.
Create frontend/vite.config.ts with React plugin, proxy /api to localhost:5000, and test configuration for vitest.
Create frontend/tsconfig.json with strict mode, JSX react-jsx, path aliases (@/ -> src/).
Create frontend/tailwind.config.js and frontend/postcss.config.js for Tailwind CSS setup.
Create frontend/index.html as the Vite entry point.
Create frontend/src/main.tsx - React app entry with BrowserRouter, QueryClientProvider, Toaster.
Create frontend/src/App.tsx - Main app component with route definitions.
Create frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx - Auth context provider managing JWT token storage, user state, login/logout functions, role-based access.
Create frontend/src/services/api.ts - Axios instance with base URL, auth token interceptor, response error handling.
Create frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx - Main layout with sidebar navigation (role-specific menu items), header with user info/logout, and content area.
Create frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx - Route wrapper that checks authentication and role authorization, redirects to login if unauthorized.
Create frontend/src/components/common/ - Reusable UI components: Button, Input, Select, Modal, Table, Card, Badge, Spinner, Pagination, FileUpload, StatCard.
Create frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx - Login page with email/password form, error handling, redirect on success based on role.
Create frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx - Admin dashboard with stat cards (total students, active batches, attendance overview, fee collection), charts for performance insights.
Create frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx - Student management: list with search/filter, create/edit modal with form, delete confirmation, batch/counsellor assignment.
Create frontend/src/pages/admin/Trainers.tsx - Trainer management: list, create/edit, batch assignment interface.
Create frontend/src/pages/admin/Counsellors.tsx - Counsellor management: list, create/edit, student assignment interface.
Create frontend/src/pages/admin/Batches.tsx - Batch management: list, create/edit with date range, assign trainers/modules/students.
Create frontend/src/pages/admin/Modules.tsx - Module/course management: list, create/edit, assign to batches.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Dashboard.tsx - Trainer dashboard: assigned batches summary, upcoming lectures, recent attendance stats.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Batches.tsx - View assigned batches with student list, module progress, batch progress tracking.

Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Lectures.tsx - Lecture management: start/end lectures, view history, schedule display. When lecture is active, show dynamic QR code that refreshes every 10 seconds using qrcode.react.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Students.tsx - Student snapshot panel: name, photo, contact, batch, module, attendance %, marks breakdown, flags (low attendance/performance), mode (offline/online).
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Attendance.tsx - Attendance view: batch attendance by lecture, mark manual attendance, attendance statistics.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Evaluation.tsx - Add/edit marks for theory, practical, project. Batch-level marks entry with student list.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/MockInterviews.tsx - Conduct mock interviews: score communication, technical, confidence. Add feedback. View history.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Assignments.tsx - Create assignments with file upload, view submissions, grade submissions with feedback.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Resources.tsx - Upload notes/materials, manage uploaded resources.
Create frontend/src/pages/trainer/Reports.tsx - View and export reports: attendance, marks, batch progress. PDF/Excel download buttons.
Create frontend/src/pages/counsellor/Dashboard.tsx - Counsellor dashboard: active students count, fee collection status, at-risk students list.
Create frontend/src/pages/counsellor/Students.tsx - View assigned students with course progress, attendance, performance metrics.
Create frontend/src/pages/counsellor/Fees.tsx - Fee management: view fee status per student, record payments, payment history, due alerts.
Create frontend/src/pages/counsellor/Alerts.tsx - View alerts from trainers (low attendance, poor performance), add remarks, track follow-ups.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx - Student dashboard: batch info, trainer details, module progress bars, attendance percentage.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Attendance.tsx - Attendance: QR scanner (html5-qrcode) for offline, 'Mark Attendance' button for online, attendance history with calendar view.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Performance.tsx - Performance view: theory/practical/project marks by module, mock interview scores, overall ranking.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Assignments.tsx - View assignments, submit work with file upload, view grades/feedback.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Resources.tsx - Browse and access learning resources by module.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Lectures.tsx - Lecture history: dates, topics covered, duration.
Create frontend/src/pages/student/Notifications.tsx - View notifications and announcements, mark as read.
Create frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts, useApi.ts, usePagination.ts - Custom hooks for auth context access, API calls with loading/error states, and pagination logic.
Create frontend/src/__tests__/Login.test.tsx - Test login page rendering and form submission.
Create frontend/src/__tests__/ProtectedRoute.test.tsx - Test route protection logic.
Ensure the frontend builds with npm run build (vite build) without errors.
acceptance_criteria: npm install succeeds for frontend workspace
Frontend builds with vite build without TypeScript or compilation errors
Login page renders with email/password form
Role-based routing correctly restricts pages to appropriate roles
Admin dashboard shows stat cards and navigation to all management pages
Trainer can view batches, start lectures with QR display, and manage evaluations
Counsellor can view students, fees, and alerts
Student can view dashboard, scan QR for attendance, and access resources
All pages have consistent layout with sidebar navigation
findings: Build succeeds with vite build. All 6 tests pass (Login page tests + ProtectedRoute tests). Used useId() hook in Input component for proper label-input association to fix test failures. The html5-qrcode library is loaded dynamically in the student attendance page for QR scanning. QR code generation in trainer lectures page uses qrcode.react with 10-second refresh interval.
